name: floating-clock
description: Always-on-top floating desktop clock for macOS — multi-file Objective-C NSPanel with three-segment dashboard (LOCAL · ACTIVE MARKETS · NEXT TO OPEN). Per-segment themes, profiles (Default / Day Trader / Night Owl / Minimalist / Watch Party), 12 major exchanges with live session state + IANA-backed DST, regional TZ abbreviations (PDT/BST/CEST/JST), UTC reference, urgency-tiered countdowns, running-head progress bars. Sub-0.1% idle CPU.
